prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 25631→29714→34853→37357→36724，整体呈持续后移趋势（位次数字增大），近 4 年累计后移约 11093 名；2025 年基准约 36724 名，较 2024 年小幅回升约 633 名，但仍处于历史高位区间；本省物理类计划 2021–2025 年依次为 95→93→92→95→98 人，2025 年较 2024 年扩招 3 人；2026 年计划 103 人，较 2025 年再扩招 5 人（增幅约 5.1%），连续两年扩招对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京林业大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜 2026 年约第 83 名，近年排名稳定在 80–85 区间，学校层次定位清晰；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及师德师风相关舆情，可能对报考热度产生轻微抑制；抖音热度为较热（总排名第 51，综合热度 637593），短视频平台关注度处于中等偏上水平；2024 年曾出现陕西文科投档线异常信号，但物理类未见明显断档记录；风景园林学为 A+ 学科（全国顶尖），是该校最具吸引力的王牌专业，对相关方向考生有较强号召力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高 ，与该校物理类招生专业高度重合，有利于维持报考热度；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 521000 人，较 2025 年（约 357675 人）大幅增长约 45.7%，按近年比例估算物理类考生约 379600 人（较 2025 年增加约 119000 人），竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移的大趋势、2026 年招生计划小幅扩招（+5.1%）以及本省物理类考生大幅增加（+45.7%）三方面因素：考生增幅远超扩招幅度，竞争压力实质性上升，预计位次将。预测最低位次约 36348 名，区间 35848–36848 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 25631→29714→34853→37357→36724, showing a continuous backward trend (increasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative backward shift of about 11093 places over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 36724, a slight rebound of about 633 places from 2024, but still in a historically high range; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 95→93→92→95→98 students respectively, with an increase of 3 students in 2025 compared to 2024; the 2026 plan is 103 students, an additional increase of 5 students (about 5.1%) compared to 2025, and two consecutive years of expansion will somewhat alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Forestry University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is about 83rd, with recent rankings stable in the 80–85 range, providing a clear positioning of the school's level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and style-related public opinion, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (overall ranking 51, comprehensive popularity 637593), with short video platform attention at an upper-middle level; in 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the Shaanxi liberal arts admission line, but no obvious gap records were seen in the Physics Category; Landscape Architecture is an A+ discipline (top in the country), the most attractive flagship major of the school, with strong appeal to candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, and they highly overlap with the school's Physics Category enrollment majors, helping to maintain application enthusiasm; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in the province in 2026 is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.7% compared to 2025 (about 357,675), and estimated Physics Category candidates are about 379,600 (an increase of about 119,000 from 2025), leading to significantly intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+5.1%), and the substantial increase in provincial Physics Category candidates (+45.7%): the increase in candidates far exceeds the expansion rate, leading to a substantive rise in competitive pressure, and the ranking is expected to shift. The predicted minimum ranking is about 36348, with a range of 35848–36848.

It is recommended that candidates within the range focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, use Tier 1 majors for a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 35500) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as the Liangxi Experimental Class and popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (e.g., outside 36800) should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also considering lower-ranked Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category has shifted from approximately 4998 → 5832 → 6864 → 6866 → 7551, continuously moving backward for 5 consecutive years (ranking number increasing), with a cumulative backward shift of about 2553 positions in the last 4 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 7551, a backward shift of about 685 positions compared to 2024 (6866), indicating a clear backward trend; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was stable at 25 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 22 in 2024, and further reduced to 20 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 24 students, an increase of 4 students (20% increase) compared to 2025, reversing the trend of two consecutive years of enrollment reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Forestry University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 83rd in 2026, with recent rankings stable in the 80–85 range; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and style public opinion, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 51st overall), with medium to high attention on short video platforms; in 2024, there was an abnormal signal in Shaanxi liberal arts admission scores (dropping sharply from 2000th to 10000th), but Jiangsu History Category has not seen obvious gaps in recent years; Landscape Architecture A+ is the only A-class discipline of the university, directly related to the Landscape Architecture and Gardening majors enrolled in the History Category, strongly attracting candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature, and Teacher Training/Education are socially hot or in a wait-and-see state of differentiation, partially overlapping with the History Category enrollment majors of this university; the total number of candidates for the 2026 provincial general college entrance examination is approximately 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.7% compared to 2025; based on recent proportions, it is estimated that there are about 141,400 History Category candidates (an increase of about 44,300 compared to 2025), significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+20%), and the substantial increase in provincial History Category candidates (+45.7%): the increase in candidates far exceeds the expansion rate, leading to a substantial rise in competitive pressure, and the ranking is expected to shift. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8057, with a range of 7557–8557.
